bullCase: NICE trades at 12x trailing P/E and 9.3x forward — incredibly cheap for a profitable enterprise software company. FY2026 EPS guidance $10.85-$11.05 raised above consensus. Revenue $3.17-3.19B. Debt-free after settling $460M. Agentic AI launch (March 10) positions NICE in the AI CX wave. Analyst targets ~$150 (36% upside).
bearCase: Stock down 55% from portfolio avg — catastrophic loss. Gross margin compressed -210bps. Several major institutional holders fully exited (Barrow Hanley, UBS, Vulcan). Enterprise SaaS in historic correction ("SaaSpocalypse"). Short interest up 32% to 5.5% of float. Market pricing existential AI risk to CX software model.
